allow: Bash(php -r "require ''includes/db.php''; $db=getDB\(\); $rows=$db->query\(''SELECT id,name,cover_image FROM rooms''\)->fetchAll\(\); foreach\($rows as $r\) echo $r[''id''].'': ''.$r[''name''].'' -> ''.\($r[''cover_image'']??''none''\).PHP_EOL;")
